notes: v0.23.1 — PvP cloak nick hide + live aim + wall slide. Cloaked opponent's nameplate now hides too (no more 'invisible ship trackable by floating nickname'). Live LANCE laser sight: position lerps smooth (22/s), aim lerps near-instant (45/s), and the network send rate is bumped 20→30 Hz so the dashed sight tracks the enemy's mouse in real time. Remote opponent slides along walls instead of phasing through them.
